notes:
v0.4.0 — Managed Cloud is live.

The 11 polish + content modes now run with zero setup. Subscribe at voquence.com/managed-cloud ($9.99/mo or $99/yr), then open Voquence Settings, sign in with your account email, and flip on Managed Cloud routing. No Anthropic key, no key management, nothing to configure. Your dictation routes through Voquence's cloud and the polished result pastes at your cursor like always.

Founders: your Founding License includes 1 year of Managed Cloud free. Create your account at voquence.com/managed-cloud/signup with the same email you used at checkout and activate your free year from the dashboard.

Prefer your own Anthropic key? Nothing changes. BYOK keeps working exactly as before.

Also in this release: fresh downloads now come as a fully signed and notarized DMG, so new installs skip the macOS 'cannot check for malicious software' warning entirely.
